title: Publications | Stats NZ
content:
## Find out about your place in New Zealand
The place summaries web tool has officially been launched.

## Final report of the 2018 Census External Data Quality Panel
Reports on the impact of the methods Stats NZ employed to compensate for the lower than expected response rate to the census on the quality of the data contained in the official census data file.

## 2018 Census External Data Quality Panel: Data sources for key 2018 Census individual variables
Presents graphs that summarise the sources of data for key 2018 Census individual variables, produced by the External Data Quality Panel.

## Overview of international peer review of 2018 Census methodology
Summarises the reviews received from international experts in statistical methodology on the administrative enumeration approach Stats NZ used in the 2018 Census.

## Data sources, editing, and imputation in the 2018 Census
Describes the 2018 Census approach for detecting data errors and for filling in gaps when the characteristics of people or dwellings have not been provided on census forms.

## New Zealand as a village of 100 people: Education and employment
Presents an overview of New Zealand's population based on 2018 Census data. It describes our population as if the country were a village of 100 people.

## 2018 Census External Data Quality Panel: Assessment of variables
Read the assessment of 2018 Census variables made by the 2018 Census external data quality panel.

## Selected ethnicity and Māori descent topics by geographic area: 2018 Census ‒ NZ.Stat tables
Selected ethnicity and Māori descent topics by geographic area tables provide downloadable tables about people (by age and sex) for New Zealand and other geographic areas.

## Electoral boundaries sensitivity analysis of 2018 Census data
Analyses the decisions that were made in constructing the 2018 Census file and how different choices of model parameters might have affected New Zealand electorates.

## Population counts sensitivity analysis of 2018 Census data
Analyses the decisions that were made in constructing the 2018 Census file and looks more broadly at all of the choices made during admin enumeration.

## Proposed electorate boundaries released
Data behind the proposed electorate boundaries and names is available to view.

## 2018 Census coverage assessment: Privacy impact assessment
Shows the benefits of conducting the 2018 Census coverage assessment survey using handheld tablets to capture the data outweigh the privacy and confidentiality risks, and these risks can be adequately managed.
